name: MPT-7B-StoryWriter-65k+
archDisplay: Decoder-only Transformer w/ ALiBi (65K-token fiction fine-tune)
note: Fiction-focused MPT-7B fine-tune trained at 65k tokens via ALiBi; demonstrated generations to ~84k tokens on a single A100-80GB node.
verificationNotes: Confirmed via Databricks MPT-7B blog (published 2023-05-05, confirms 65k-token fiction fine-tune and demonstrated generations to 84k tokens matching the note) and HF model card mosaicml/mpt-7b-storywriter (Apache-2.0 license, 65k training context, requires trust_remote_code).
